Stand of trees between Lancaster Leaf Tobacco and the mown field full of electrical pylons.
There are canes of gorgeous berries along the treeline all the way up both sides. Access: Public.

Wild black cherries are along the paths through the forest. The fruit falls ripe and doesn't last so you basically have to be there when it falls to get it. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
